description: Canonical task lifecycle states and allowed transitions. Invalid transitions are detectable by validation. No transition automatically infers merge or deploy authorization; MERGED and DEPLOYED require explicit prior owner authorization gates.

authorizationGates.APPROVED_to_MERGED: requires ownerAuthorizations.merge === true (explicit); never inferred from CI success or review
authorizationGates.MERGED_to_DEPLOY_READY: records that a merge occurred; does NOT grant deploy
authorizationGates.DEPLOY_READY_to_DEPLOYED: requires ownerAuthorizations.deploy === true (explicit) and an owner-approved master SHA

invariants: no path exists from PR_OPEN or APPROVED to DEPLOYED without passing MERGED then DEPLOY_READY
a transition not listed in allowedTransitions is invalid
